title: jacobaea ambigua subsp. nebrodensis
intro: Jacobaea ambigua subsp. nebrodensis, also known as Jacobaea nebrodensis, is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Jacobaea ambigua plant, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones. Jacobaea ambigua subsp. nebrodensis is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
